'''12-4C-41 traffic control droids''' were a series of traffic controller [[Droid/Legends|droids]] produced by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. These droids were [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in stature, with many similarities to the [[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series]] [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]].

==History==
The 12-4C-41 was produced to replace organic traffic controllers, whose bodies and minds could tire and thus enable accidents. One of their main characteristics was a large floodlight mounted on the torso, which could be used as a beacon to guide ships in.<ref name="EGD" />

The [[12-4C-41/b]] sub-series recycled the 12-4C-41 body but with less mental power. It was sold as a basic worker drone.<ref name="EGD" />

[[12-4C-41|Wuntoo Forcee Forwun]] was a traffic control unit of this model who worked at [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]].<ref name="EGD" />

{{Droid-stub}}
